name: The Great Zombie Warzone
description: The Great Zombie Warzone is a tower-defense arcade game with 3D cartoon zombies and soldiers on the street. At ten levels, you need to eliminate all incoming hungry zombies by settling the marines on suitable positions. When you destroy some of them, you will receive some gold coins to upgrade and buy more marines!
tags: Arcade, Boy, Boys, Fight, Fighting, Fun, H5, HTML5, Kid, Kids, Tower Defense, Zombie
